steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What sound does the big animal make?
questions.hint: It sounds like a musical instrument!

questions.question_text: What does the big animal eat?
questions.hint: It's green and grows in fields!

questions.question_text: How does the big animal move?
questions.hint: It uses its legs to get around!

items.definition: Person who takes care of animals

items.example: That is a cow. It says Moo!

steps.title: On the Farm
steps.text: Look at the big farm. That is a cow. It says Moo. Is that a horse? Yes, it is! The farmer smiles. This is a happy day for our class.

steps.explanation: Use 'That is' for something far away.

steps.audio_text: On the sunny farm, the farmer greets all the animals. The cow goes moo and the horse trots happily.

steps.prompt: Point and Say: That is a horse.

questions.question_text: What animal says moo? (Vocabulary question)
That is a ___. (Grammar question)
Where does the farmer work? (Reading comprehension question)
True or False: A farmer lives in the city.
Finish the sentence: That is a big ___.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What noise do sheep make? 🐑
questions.hint: It sounds like 'baa baa black sheep'!

questions.question_text: What do ducks eat? 🦆
Where do sheep sleep? 🌙
questions.hint: It has a roof and keeps them dry!

items.example: That is a sheep. It says baa.
Is that a duck? It says quack.

steps.title: Fun on the Farm
steps.text: That is a white sheep. Is that a duck? Yes, the duck can swim. It says quack! I love animals. This is a happy day for our class.

questions.question: Can the duck swim?
questions.locate_text: Yes, the duck can swim. It says quack!

steps.explanation: Use to say what an animal is.

steps.audio_text: Look at the farm! That is a white sheep. Is that sheep saying baa? Yes, it says baa!

questions.question: What sound does the sheep make?

questions.question_text: What color are the sheep? (Vocabulary question)
Is that a ___? (Grammar question)
True or False: The ducks like to swim.
Where do ducks swim? (Reading Comprehension)

lessons.title: Pig and Chicken
lessons.topic: Birds, pigs and animal sound recognition

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which farm animal says oink and loves mud?
questions.hint: This animal is pink and has a curly tail.

questions.question_text: Which bird on the farm has a colorful tail and says cock-a-doodle-doo?
questions.hint: This bird wakes everyone up in the morning.

questions.question_text: Which animal says baa and has woolly fur?
questions.hint: This animal gives us wool to make clothes.

items.example: That is a pig. It says Oink.
Is that a chicken? It says Cluck.
That is an egg from a chicken.
Look at the mud! Is that a pig in it?

steps.title: Farm Friends
steps.text: Look at the pig. It is very pink. The pig is in the mud. That is a chicken. Is that a chicken egg? The egg is big!

questions.question: Where is the pig?
questions.locate_text: The pig is in the mud. That is a chicken.

steps.explanation: Say what sound an animal makes.

steps.audio_text: Listen closely! The chicken is laying an egg in the henhouse. That little pig is playing in the mud!

questions.question: Is the pig playing in the mud?
Is the talk about cooking pizza?

questions.question_text: Which word means a baby bird might come out of it? (Vocabulary question)
The chicken says ___. (Grammar question)
True or False: Pigs love playing in dry sand.
What is the main topic of our lesson? (Reading comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal lives in a coop and lays eggs?
Which animal pulls wagons and is very strong?
Which animal swims in ponds and quacks?
questions.hint: This animal loves water and says 'quack'!

steps.title: Morning on the Farm
steps.text: Good morning! I see the sun. That is a rooster. Is that a cow? It says Moo! The hen is laying eggs. I love my animals!

steps.audio_text: Look at the brown horse. It loves to run in the field. Oh, is that a sheep? It says baa!

questions.question: What does the horse love to do?
What sound does the sheep make?

steps.prompt: Say: That is a cow. What does it say?
steps.expected_text: that is a cow it says moo

questions.question_text: What is it doing? It says ___.
Which animal goes 'moo' on the farm?
True or False: Is that a sheep? Yes, it is.
Which sentence uses 'That is a...' correctly?
